---
title: Geospatial EDA of Hourly OD Data
author: Drew Galloro
format:
  html:
   theme: cosmo
   toc: true
   code-copy: true
   code-block-background: true
   code-overflow: wrap
embed-resources: true
---

# First Pass

## Load in 2018 Data

We'll just use the 2018 data since it's lighter and faster to work with.

```{r}
library(tidyverse)
library(sf)
dir <- "../data/date-hour-soo-dest-"
od_2018 <- read_csv(paste(dir,"2018.csv", sep = ""), 
        col_names = c(
            "date", 
            "hour", 
            "origin",
            "destination",
            "ridership"
        ))
```

```{r}
kml_data1 <- st_read("../data/stations-and-lines/doc.kml")

# Extract coordinates (returns a matrix with X/Y or Lon/Lat)
coords <- st_coordinates(kml_data)

# Convert to a data frame for easier use
coords_df <- as.data.frame(coords)

ggplot() + 
    geom_sf(data = kml_data1)
```

We'll need to use the BART legacy API to get station locations: https://api.bart.gov/docs/stn/stns.aspx
